/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/image_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/ArgsParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/FilterRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/BlurFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/GrayscaleFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/NegativeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/CropFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/SharpFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/EdgeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/SunFadeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/io/BMPReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/io/BMPWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/io/ImageFormatFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/images/Image.cpp.o -o image_processor
